chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-238 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.03.2022 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Laghari, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. Mr. Saddam Hussain Thebo advocate for respondent No.4 along with Munawar Zareef CMO Municipal Committee Tando Allahyar. ----- Parawise comments of respondent No. 4 is filed, which is taken on record, and copy whereof is provided to petitioner’s counsel. Respondent No.4’s counsel at the very outset submits that they (petitioner) withdrew from the process of the application for the appointment of the petitioner on deceased quota and as long as the file is not processed, the respondent No.5 will not make any effort. Comments of respondent No.5 have also been filed wherein they have stated that as soon as the respondent No.4 process the case of petitioner, the respondent No.5 without wasting any time will forward it to the high-ups / concerned authorities for the consideration in accordance with government policy. Such being situation, the petitioner’s counsel submits that he would return the file to respondent No.4 for an action to be taken in accordance with law so that respondent No.5 may pursue the case of petitioner. With this understanding petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
